name: command
title: BTCommand
description: Command palette / search menu (web only). Compound component system: BTCommand · BTCommandInput · BTCommandList · BTCommandEmpty · BTCommandGroup · BTCommandItem · BTCommandSeparator · BTCommandShortcut · BTCommandDialog.

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
/**
 * BTCommandList — scrollable container for groups and items.
 * Place BTCommandEmpty, BTCommandGroup, BTCommandItem inside.
 */
import BTScrollbar from '../scrollbar/BTScrollbar.vue';
</script>

<template>
  <BTScrollbar class="bt-command__list" role="listbox">
    <slot />
  </BTScrollbar>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
/**
 * BTCommandSeparator — horizontal dividing line between groups.
 */
</script>

<template>
  <hr class="bt-command__separator" aria-hidden="true" />
</template>
